description_long: This is a red aluminum can featuring the iconic Coca-Cola branding in bold white script, wrapping around the cylindrical surface. The can has a standard pull-tab opening on the top, which is metallic silver and slightly recessed. Nutritional information, recycling symbols, and product details are printed in white and green on the back side of the can. The surface is smooth and glossy, reflecting light and giving the can a sleek appearance. The can is sized for a single serving, typically found in urban environments such as vending machines, convenience stores, or littered on sidewalks. The overall design is instantly recognizable due to its distinctive color scheme and branding.
description: A glossy red Coca-Cola can with white branding and a metallic pull-tab top, featuring nutritional labeling and product details on the back.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large, white Coca-Cola script logo on a red background.
description_view_1: Back view displaying nutritional information, recycling symbols, and product details in white and green text.
description_view_2: Side view with partial visibility of both the logo and nutritional labeling, showing the can's cylindrical shape.
description_view_3: Angled front view highlighting the Coca-Cola logo and a portion of the side text.
attribute_brand_logo: A large, white Coca-Cola script logo is prominently displayed on the front and side of the can, curving vertically along the red background.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Nutritional information and product details are visible on the back of the can, including a nutrition facts panel and recycling symbols.
